name: Who trained with me in the dojo?
Who cares about this company even more than me?
Who do I have amazing chemistry with in the ring?
Who is trying to steal my spotlight?
Who did I debut with, then leave behind?
Who has taken me under their wing?
Who is jealous of my rapid rise?
Who has attached themselves to me to feed off of my success?
Who did I kick the shit out of to prove how tough I am?
With whom do I have a reluctant alliance against a mutual enemy?
Who have I called out as a slave to management?
Who wishes they were as cool as me?
Who has sung my praises to get me on the roster?
Who thinks I'm completely overrated?
With whom do I have an old rivalry that can now be restarted?
Who's spot am I threatening to take now that I'm here?
Who asks me for tips to add something fresh to their act?
Who am I overshadowing with my antics?
Who always turns to me to save their segments when they drop the ball?
Who thinks I'm a waste of a roster slot?
Who has earned my respect with their legit fighting skills?
Who did I beat when they challenged me to a shoot fight?
Who wants to add more entertainment to my repertoire?
Who am I afraid of?
Who is jealous of my devoted fan base?
Who is willing to make me bleed?
Who has returned from an injury I gave them?
Who can take everything I can dish out?
Who can't remember who I am?
Who was my tag team partner before they made it big?
Who thinks they're too important to work with me?
Who is trying to get me bigger paydays to reward me for my work?
Who allied with me on my first team?
Who is ripping off my high-flying style?
Who thinks I don't deserve my mask (or overall look)?
Who is trying to convince me to change my style, my mask, or both?
Who was instrumental to my early success?
Who wants me to just retire already?
Who is honored to be on my team?
Who knows about (at least) one my dirty secrets?
Who do I manage/accompany to the ring?
description: If you don't manage another player's wrestler, decide which NPW you manage and start with Heat +3

name: Who is trying to undermine me with my client?
Who turned on me when I was their Manager?
Who knows I have their best interests at heart?
Who is legitimately terrified of me?
Who's made me look weak?
Who helps me come up with new directions for my character?
Who can stand up to me in the ring?
Who saw the potential in me to excel at being such an oddball?
Who thinks I'm all smoke and no fire?
Who is trying to steal my approach?
Who's starstruck by me, even though we're peers?
Who was holding me back as my tag team partner?
Who's learning new skills by watching me in the ring?
Who's jealous of my technical ability?
Who is trying to teach me skills I need for outside of the ring?
Who have I decided is killing the business with their performance?
Who is my protégé?
Who has no respect for all the work I've put into this company?
Who is desperately seeking my approval?
